title: taraxacum polytomum
intro: Taraxacum polytomum, also known as the variable dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus that is characterized by its variable leaf morphology. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum polytomum include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum polytomum include improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum polytomum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
